_comment: Generalization ruleset for the workflow kit. scrub.py applies these on every push. replacements run in array order (compound/specific BEFORE bare tokens). allowlist tokens are sentinel-protected so no replacement can mangle them. verifyDenylist patterns block the push if any survive after generalization. Synthesized from a 5-category identity audit + adversarial verification; case-insensitive denylist entries use an inline (?i).

replacements.note: Operator's real agency name. MUST precede the bare \bPhoenix\b rule or it mangles to 'the user Web & AI'.
Operator's current placeholder agency brand.
Residual 'Lone Star' mark (Texas reference).
SMS vendor connector label (source-registry + dashboard).
No-space label variant in SPEC.md.
Vendor display name -> generic.
Connector id key (used as a JS identifier/json key; keep hyphen-free so dashboard.mjs stays valid).
Connector data-store alias.

Compound-adjective prefix ('a Phoenix-triggered dispatch') -> 'a user-triggered dispatch'. Runs BEFORE the cap/bare rules so they don't produce the ungrammatical 'a the user-'. Lookahead protects hyphenated brand tokens.
Sentence/line-initial operator name (incl. list bullets/numbers/blockquotes) -> capitalized 'The user'. Runs before the bare rule.
Operator name right after sentence-ending punctuation -> capitalized 'The user'.
Possessive operator name -> keep possessive. Runs before bare Phoenix.
All-caps operator name (e.g. 'PHOENIX DECIDES').
PRIMARY rule. Capitalized operator first-name (~900 hits). \b protects 'Phoenixn82'; lookahead protects hyphenated brand tokens; case-sensitive never touches lowercase brand bird.
Operator-named personal dir, not the brand bird. Prefix-anchored.
Operator GitHub owner handle -> portable placeholder. Does not mask the operator email before the email denylist can block it.

A foreign/old Windows account name used as a 'wrong user, dead path' foil (C:\Users\phoen, 'phoen != <you>'). Word-boundary anchored so it never touches 'phoenix'. NOTE: the operator's real username is genericized at runtime in scrub.py (no hardcoded username here -> portable to any machine).
Rejected brand-direction slug. Runs before bare Texas. Replacement avoids ending in 'direction' so 'the old Texas-heritage direction' doesn't stutter.
Home city. Case-insensitive to also catch the all-caps 'HOUSTON' eyebrow.
Home-state demonym.
Home state.
Texas-specific chain -> fictional name (grammar-safe, avoids doubled-article).
Real client domain in test fixtures/SPEC. Covers bare, https://, and sc-domain: forms. Replaced consistently so tests stay green.
Client slug (snake_case); also fixes derived analytics filenames.
Kebab-case client slug variant.
Title-case client display name.
Abbreviated client name used as a sample <project> in a router task_id example.
Real GA4 property id (resource-path form). Leaves the obviously-dummy properties/123 fixture alone.
Same GA4 id in quoted-id form. Quoted so no unrelated digit runs are touched.
Private project slug. Before bare Lyndon.
Project display name.
Private project slug.
Hyphenated variant of the private project slug.
Project display name.
Private project slug.
Project codename (kebab).
Scraper subcomponent (NOT the framework 'apex' tier, which is left untouched).
Scraper subcomponent.
Private project name (roster).
Private project name (roster).
Backtick-anchored roster slug; avoids false-positives on the common word 'atlas'.
Operator's own setup project name used as a demo-vault example.
Operator's real self-hosted app, the 'works every time' exemplar. Case-insensitive to catch Odysseus.exe / odysseus-start.ps1 / Odysseus.lnk.
Real competitor parenthetical (drop it; sentence reads clean).
Real local competitor parenthetical (drop it).

allowlist.why: Example brand's firebird logo mark (design-library, non-identifying).
Shipped file-lock infra folder (~/agentic-os/bin/aos_lock.py); blanket-replacing the slug breaks verify-bridge.py + the lock hook.
Reusable company-agnostic engine name; only its embedded client refs are genericized.
Generic functional scheduled-task label for the shipped router.
Upstream FreeLLMAPI maintainer's handle in the install-path slug; not the operator.
Functional contract port of the shipped local router.
Generic dev port for the analytics-sites OAuth worker.
Illustrative placeholder reviewer login in ship-to-stores.md.
Generic 'use a business email not gmail.com' advice (a domain noun).

verifyDenylist.pattern: Phoenix Web & AI|Lone Star Web & AI
verifyDenylist.label: operator agency names
